title: SpaceX IPOs on Friday. The 55% rule says don’t chase it.
full_text: For much of the past month, Wall Street has been chanting the same three letters: SPCX, the Nasdaq ticker SpaceX intends to use when it begins trading on June 12, 2026. Retail investors have piled into the Destiny Tech100 vehicle, prediction markets have lit up, and r/wallstreetbets has turned a single post titled “$8 to ... SpaceX IPOs on Friday. The 55% rule says don’t chase it.
